title: TikTok Events API provider config
description: Configuration shape for a TikTok Events API integration.

pixel_code.description: TikTok Pixel Code (called Pixel ID in TikTok Business Center). Format: C followed by uppercase alphanumerics.

access_token.description: TikTok Business API access token. Generated in TikTok Business Center. Encrypted at rest.

test_event_code.description: Optional test event code (called test_id in TikTok's docs). Used when test_mode=true. TikTok routes these events to the Test Events tab.

advertiser_id.description: Optional TikTok Advertiser ID for events that need to be attributed to a specific ad account. Rare — most tenants have exactly one advertiser.
